hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""' | grep -qE '(^|[^[:alnum:]_])(grep|egrep|fgrep|rg|ripgrep|ag|find)([[:space:]]|$)' && printf '%s' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"Reminder: prefer codegraph (codegraph_explore/codegraph_search/codegraph_callers) over raw grep/rg/find/ag for code/symbol exploration. Raw text-search is only OK for XML literal-string/attribute lookups that are not symbols."}}' || true
